Class ExitMainAction

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.AbstractAction
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.KeyAction
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.MainWindowAction
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.ExitMainAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, Action
public class ExitMainAction extends MainWindowAction

  • Field Details

    • exitSystem

      public static final boolean exitSystem
      If it is true the whole application is exited via System.exit(int). If it is false the main window is only closed and the application will be still alive.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • windowListener

      public final WindowListener windowListener

  • Constructor Details

    • ExitMainAction

      public ExitMainAction(MainWindow mainWindow)

  • Method Details

    • exitMain

      protected void exitMain()

    • saveSettings

      public void saveSettings()
      makes all GUI settings persistence; this method is also called by the Eclipse integration to store the settings

    • exitMainWithoutInteraction

      public void exitMainWithoutInteraction()

      This method closes the main window directly without asking the user.

      This functionality must be available separate for developers because for instance the Eclipse integration has to close the main window when Eclipse is closed.

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e)
